constraints.layout_style: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input

reference_templates.notes: Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: External submit

reference_templates.title: Question number prefixes
reference_templates.notes: Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Question prefixes

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Reference DOM (Submit outside form): Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute Reference DOM (Optgroup select): Department select uses optgroup for grouping options Reference DOM (Question number prefixes): Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: split-phone, native-select-not-combobox, duplicate-name-attrs, pill-yes-no, div-role-textbox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Submit outside form; Optgroup select; Question number prefixes.
